untranslatable_reason: Not a sizing rule. THARP_DRY_7_2 describes a risk management REQUIREMENT (establishing predefined exit mechanisms before entry) and entry CONDITIONS, not how to SIZE positions. The parameters provided (primary_stop_loss_percent, secondary_stop_loss_percent, etc.) are exit thresholds and validation rules, not position sizing methodology. This belongs in entry/exit DSL, not position sizing extraction.
